name: math-explainer-video
description: Build 3Blue1Brown-style visual, intuition-first math explainer videos with Manim — a complete, battle-tested YouTube pipeline: topic confirmation gates, Hinglish-native TTS narration (Sarvam) with per-sentence sync, free pre-render QA (static layout frames, AST narration audit, independent editor-agent review), the render→frame-critique→fix loop, music mixing verified by subtraction, chapter markers, mascot rules, thumbnail recipe, and every Manim gotcha that cost real hours.
